questions.q: The Malayalam actor Mammootty is popularly known by which honorific title?
questions.explanation: Mammootty is widely referred to as the Megastar of Malayalam cinema.

questions.q: In which year was the Malayalam actor Mammootty born?
questions.explanation: Mammootty was born on 7 September 1951.

questions.q: Mammootty is a leading star of which regional film industry in India?
questions.explanation: Mammootty rose to prominence as one of the dominant stars of Malayalam cinema.

questions.q: How many times has the actor Mammootty won the National Film Award for Best Actor?
questions.explanation: Mammootty has won the National Film Award for Best Actor three times, for Oru Vadakkan Veeragatha, Mathilukal and Vidheyan.

questions.q: Which profession did Mammootty practise before becoming a full-time actor?
questions.explanation: Mammootty earned a law degree and practised as a lawyer before he committed fully to acting.

questions.q: In which Indian state was the actor Mammootty born?
questions.explanation: Mammootty was born in Chandiroor, in the Alappuzha district of Kerala.

questions.q: Mammootty and which other actor are regarded as the twin defining superstars of Malayalam cinema from the 1980s onward?
questions.explanation: Mammootty and Mohanlal are considered the two dominant stars of Malayalam cinema from the 1980s onward.

questions.q: In 1998 the Government of India conferred which civilian honour on the actor Mammootty?
questions.explanation: Mammootty was awarded the Padma Shri by the Government of India in 1998.

questions.q: Mammootty's National Award-winning role as the warrior Chandu appeared in which 1989 film?
questions.explanation: Mammootty won his first National Film Award for Best Actor for Oru Vadakkan Veeragatha (1989), playing Chandu.

questions.q: Mammootty's son, who is also a well-known film actor, is named what?
questions.explanation: Mammootty's son Dulquer Salmaan is a popular actor in Malayalam and Tamil cinema.

questions.q: For which 1990 film, based on a Vaikom Muhammad Basheer novel, did Mammootty win his second National Film Award for Best Actor?
questions.explanation: Mammootty won his second National Award for Adoor Gopalakrishnan's Mathilukal (1990), based on Basheer's novel.

questions.q: Mammootty's third National Film Award for Best Actor came for his role in which 1993 Adoor Gopalakrishnan film?
questions.explanation: Mammootty won his third National Award for Vidheyan (1993), directed by Adoor Gopalakrishnan.

questions.q: Which acclaimed Malayalam director cast Mammootty in both Mathilukal and Vidheyan?
questions.explanation: Adoor Gopalakrishnan directed Mammootty in both Mathilukal (1990) and Vidheyan (1993).

questions.q: In the 2009 film Paleri Manikyam, directed by Ranjith, Mammootty was notable for playing how many distinct characters?
questions.explanation: Mammootty played a triple role in Ranjith's Paleri Manikyam: Oru Pathirakolapathakathinte Katha (2009).

questions.q: In Jabbar Patel's 2000 biopic, Mammootty portrayed which Indian constitutional figure?
questions.explanation: Mammootty played Dr. B. R. Ambedkar in the 2000 biographical film Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar.

questions.q: Mammootty played a wronged journalist turned avenger in which 1987 Malayalam thriller directed by Joshiy?
questions.explanation: Mammootty starred in the 1987 hit New Delhi, written by Dennis Joseph and directed by Joshiy.

questions.q: In the 1993 film Ponthan Mada, Mammootty's acclaimed performance was directed by which filmmaker?
questions.explanation: Ponthan Mada (1993), which earned Mammootty critical acclaim, was directed by T. V. Chandran.

questions.q: Mammootty served as the founder-chairman of which Kerala film body?
options: Film and Television Institute of India
questions.explanation: Mammootty served as the founder-chairman of the Kerala State Chalachitra Academy.

questions.q: Which 1991 Bharathan film, in which Mammootty played a fisherman named Achooty, is considered one of his finest performances?
questions.explanation: Mammootty played the fisherman Achooty in Bharathan's Amaram (1991).

questions.q: Mammootty's first credited lead role came in which 1980 M. T. Vasudevan Nair-scripted film directed by Hariharan?
questions.explanation: Mammootty gained early recognition in Vilkkanundu Swapnangal (1980), written by M. T. Vasudevan Nair and directed by Hariharan.

questions.q: The 2023 film Kaathal: The Core was produced under which banner co-owned by Mammootty?
questions.explanation: Kaathal: The Core (2023) was produced under Mammootty's banner, Mammootty Kampany.

questions.q: In the 2010 satirical comedy Pranchiyettan & the Saint, directed by Ranjith, Mammootty played a businessman from which Kerala town?
questions.explanation: Mammootty played the Thrissur-based rice merchant Pranchiyettan in Ranjith's Pranchiyettan & the Saint (2010).

questions.q: What is the birth name of the actor known professionally as Mammootty?
questions.explanation: Mammootty was born Muhammad Kutty Ismail Paniparambil, with 'Mammootty' being a familiar form of his name.

questions.q: In which decade did Mammootty make his earliest minor on-screen appearances, well before his lead career took off?
questions.explanation: Mammootty made minor appearances in films during the 1970s, including Anubhavangal Paalichakal (1971), long before his stardom.

questions.q: In Oru Vadakkan Veeragatha, the 1989 film for which Mammootty won a National Award, his character Chandu was drawn from which Kerala ballad tradition?
questions.explanation: Oru Vadakkan Veeragatha retold the Vadakkan Pattukal (Northern Ballads) of Kerala, with Mammootty playing Chandu.

questions.q: Across his three National Film Award for Best Actor wins, for which of the following years did Mammootty NOT win?
questions.explanation: Mammootty's three National Best Actor awards were for the years 1989, 1990 and 1993, not 1996.

questions.q: The 2022 psychological thriller Rorschach was produced by Mammootty under which of his banners?
questions.explanation: Rorschach (2022) was produced by Mammootty under the Mammootty Kampany banner.

questions.q: Mammootty has long served as the chairman of which Malayalam television channel, launched in 2000?
questions.explanation: Mammootty is the chairman of Malayalam Communications Ltd, which runs Kairali TV, launched in August 2000.

questions.q: Which 1991 Tamil film featuring Mammootty alongside Rajinikanth was directed by Mani Ratnam?
questions.explanation: Mammootty co-starred with Rajinikanth in Mani Ratnam's Tamil film Thalapathi (1991).

questions.q: In which 2023 Lijo Jose Pellissery film did Mammootty play a man who awakes believing he is a deceased Tamil stranger?
questions.explanation: Mammootty led Lijo Jose Pellissery's Nanpakal Nerathu Mayakkam (2023), a widely acclaimed performance.
